✦ An Exclusive Celebration ✦

Victory Party

We did it. Now we celebrate.

❧

You are warmly invited to join us as we raise a glass to triumph, resilience, and the incredible people who made this victory possible. Your presence would mean the world to us on this special evening.

📅 Date Thursday
May 22, 2026
📍 Venue Laresio Lakeside
Resort

✦ Evening Schedule ✦

5:00 PM Arrival & Welcome Cocktails by the Lake
6:00 PM Victory Toast & Opening Remarks
7:00 PM Grand Dinner — Lakeside Banquet
8:30 PM Live Music, Dancing & Entertainment
10:00 PM Fireworks Display & After Party

✦ What Awaits You ✦

🍾Complimentary welcome drinks & cocktail hour
🍽️Luxurious lakeside banquet dinner
🎶Live music & curated entertainment
🎆Spectacular fireworks over the lake
📸Photo booth & memories to keep forever
🎁Exclusive gift tokens for all attendees

See You at the Celebration!

Your RSVP has been confirmed. We're absolutely thrilled to have you join us for this unforgettable night at Laresio Lakeside Resort on May 22, 2026.

We'll Miss You

No worries at all — we completely understand. We'll be thinking of you and raising a glass in your honor on the night. The victory belongs to all of us, you included.

The celebration lives on. Until next time. 🏆
